title: My Secret Crush
content: Ava had a secret crush on Ethan for almost a year. They worked in the same office and often had lunch together, but she never told him how she felt. One afternoon, Ethan invited her to a small bakery after work. They laughed while sharing a chocolate cake and talking about their favorite childhood memories. Before they left, Ethan smiled and said, “I always look forward to spending time with you.” Ava felt her heart race. Maybe her secret was not a secret anymore.
